title: citrus × aurantium var. lima
intro: Citrus × aurantium var. lima, also known as bitter orange or Seville orange, is a variety of citrus plant that is commonly used for its medicinal and culinary properties. The peel of the Citrus × aurantium var. lima plant contains a high concentration of limonene and furanocoumarins, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Citrus × aurantium var. lima include reducing anxiety and stress, improving digestion, and aiding in weight loss, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Citrus × aurantium var. lima is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
